title: Signage hall 7 — colour rule
statement: All warning signs in hall 7 must be painted blue.

title: Signage hall 7 — execution
statement: Warning signs in hall 7 are painted exclusively in red.

title: Delivery: tyres (A)
statement: every car is delivered with 4 tyres

title: Delivery: tyres (B)
statement: All cars are delivered with four tyres

title: Kitchen: cleaning
statement: The office kitchen is cleaned every Friday.
